Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10869 0 0}I swear I usually don't go jumpin' into fights or anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}Man, can you believe they were startin' shit? Talk about being a sore loser.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}Did they seriously think they could stand a chance against me in a real fight?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}If you didn't stop me back there, I probably would've beaten the crap outta them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10882 0 0}{f 5 13 8 15 105}Guess you're right. Not like I'd lose to a bunch of tantrum-throwing nobodies anyways.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 105 3 25 25}But yeah... It's pretty stupid to risk injury when we've got a competition soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like Miyamoto's cooled his head off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10829 0 0}What, you think I'd lose to those guys? They're just a bunch of tantrum-throwing nobodies![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}Or is it because of my knee? Ha, they would've needed that handicap![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto looks angry.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10822 0 0}{f 5 13 8 30 105}Y-Yeah, you're right... It doesn't mean shit if I win against those guys.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}It's just my knee, man. I've been on edge lately 'cause of it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto seems impressed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10867 0 0}Guess I owe you one. C'mon, I'll treat you. Let's get some food.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 105 1 25 25}I'm pretty fast at paying people back. Almost as fast as I can run![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After enjoying a meal together,[n]I headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
